feedback.text: Hello, I would like to express a clear dissatisfaction on the part of the company BIOWARE and Eletronic ARTS, which today is with a server disconnection announcement by the ANTHEM game, and that they clearly informed that the date of the disconnection is 180 days before the disconnection and thereafter we will be left without access to the game, which makes it more indigent in my view that the game could be played offline from the outset, as this would be entirely possible but by choices of the developers was not done, then even now with the closure they simply tell them that the game will be closed and ready, who spends more time.
